Title: QUALIFY
Description: Allows filtering window functions results. It is similar to theWHEREclause, but the difference is thatWHEREis performed before window functions evaluation, whileQUALIFYis performed after it.

It is possible to reference window functions results fromSELECTclause inQUALIFYclause by their alias. Alternatively,QUALIFYclause can filter on results of additional window functions that are not returned in query results.
QUALIFYcan't be used if there are no window functions to evaluate. UseWHEREinstead.
